scripts.lint: pnpm --dir frontend run lint && uv run --project backend ruff check backend
scripts.type-check: pnpm --dir frontend run type-check && uv run --project backend ty check backend
scripts.check:root: pnpm run cspell && npx -y biome check "**/*.{md,json,yml,yaml,toml}" && npx -y markdownlint-cli2 "**/*.md"
scripts.contracts:validate: pnpm run contracts:types && pnpm --dir frontend run contracts:validate
scripts.contracts:generate: uv run --project backend python backend/scripts/generate_protocol_contracts.py && pnpm --dir frontend run contracts:asyncapi
